summary.concern: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs — 18 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Good momentum — overdue count is down to 88. This is above the 7-day average of 47 — the trend is heading the wrong direction. 30 tasks are actively in progress — that's solid execution across the board. 2 tasks should be active but are stuck waiting on blockers — these need immediate attention. Credit to Brandy Sexton (CNG2025-508) — cleared all overdue.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** The oldest overdue task is 9 days past due with 18 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 8 payment tasks due this week.

**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** The oldest overdue task is 8 days past due with 16 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** 3 overdue — tackle the oldest first, they're the most likely to cascade. **4 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Jeff:** Carrying 24 overdue and it's been growing — needs attention today.

165 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **70 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 61 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$0 in payments going out this week** across 41 tasks — make sure funds are available. Heavy week ahead for Ginger Brown and Stephanie and Marc Felton — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 24. Keep the momentum going.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 18 overdue (oldest: 9d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **7 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 20 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** 8 overdue — oldest first. 1 active-blocked — clear the blockers to keep moving. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 7 overdue (oldest: 8d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 25 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** 16 overdue (oldest: 10d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **15 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 25 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
